THELMA FRAZIEAR
CHIEF OF STAFF

COMMITTEES

CHAIRPERSON

BUDGET AND
FISCAL REVIEW
ELECTIONS
JUDICIARY
PUBLIC EMPLOYMENT
AND RETIREMENT
SELECT COMMITTEE ON
CITIZEN PARTICIPATION
IN GOVERNMENT
SELECT COMMITTEE ON
CHILDREN AND YOUTH

LOS ANGELES OFFICE
4401 CRENSHAW BLVD
SUITE 201
LOS ANGELES, CA 90043
(213) 295-6655

California State Senate

Dee

DIANE E. WATSON, PH.D.
TWENTY-EIGHTH SENATORIAL DISTRICT
CHAIRPERSON

Senate Committee on Health and Human Services

December 10, 1990

Ms. Kathryn Donovan, General Counsel
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804

Dear Ms. Donovan,

    I am writing to request clarification regarding the
current limitations on speaking fees for elected officials.

    Specifically, I wish to inquire if a seated Legislator
joins a Speaker's Bureau as an independent contractor, would
it be permissible for that Legislator to be paid for speaking
on non-legislative topics?  Further, if such payment was
prohibited under these circumstances, what, if any, condition
or restriction might make such an arrangement possible?

    I very much appreciate your attention to this matter and
look forward to your response.  Thank you.

                                        Sincerely,

                                        [signature]

                                        DIANE E. WATSON, Ph.D.
                                        Senator, 28th District

DEW:JDM/plp
